originalTitle: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
summary: Get ready for more AI characters in Fortnite. Developer Epic Games is going to let Fortnite creators publish experiences featuring characters with AI-powered voices starting on July 30th, and ahead of that launch, it's created 36 characters with "consistent voices and personas" that creators can use as NPCs. The characters include Fortnite staples like Agent […]
content: Get ready for more AI characters in Fortnite. Developer Epic Games is going to let Fortnite creators publish experiences featuring characters with AI-powered voices starting on July 30th, and ahead of that launch, it’s created 36 characters with “consistent voices and personas” that creators can use as NPCs. The characters include Fortnite staples like Agent Jonesy, Peely (the banana), Fishstick (a walking fish), and Cuddle Team Leader (who wears a pink bear mascot head). Epic tested the waters of AI characters with last year’s Darth Vader NPC that was powered by James Earl Jones’ voice — a collaboration that Jones’ estate signed off on. Even though players quickly got Vader to swear, something Epic fixed quickly, the company announced shortly after debuting Vader that Fortnite creators would be able to make AI-powered characters of their own.  The voices for these new personas rely on “performances captured from independent professional actors specifically for use in developer-made islands,” Epic says. “The actors agreed to have their performances used to develop voice models that create the spoken responses for these LLM-powered Fortnite characters.” Shiina, a Fortnite content creator, made a video featuring some of the voices: [Media: https://twitter.com/ShiinaBR/status/2077838679351898502] Down the line, it sounds like Epic wants to make characters featuring voices from the well-known actors that have appeared in the Fortnite universe, but it will have to secure the right approvals to do so. “Our next step is to work with the relevant guilds and character voice actors who have previously worked on Fortnite Battle Royale to explore opportunities to make their original voices available across the Fortnite ecosystem,” the company says. Epic started letting creators test their own AI characters earlier this year, but it laid out a few ground rules to try and keep them from becoming problematic.
chineseTitle: 《堡垒之夜》正在获得大量由 AI 驱动的“角色”
chineseSummary: 准备好在《堡垒之夜》中迎接更多 AI 角色吧。开发商 Epic Games 将从 7 月 30 日开始让《堡垒之夜》的创作者发布带有人工智能语音的角色体验，在发布之前，它已经创建了 36 个具有“一致的声音和角色”的角色，创作者可以将其用作 NPC。这些角色包括 Fortnite 的主要角色，例如特工 [...]
chineseContent: 准备好在《堡垒之夜》中迎接更多 AI 角色吧。开发商 Epic Games 将从 7 月 30 日开始让《堡垒之夜》的创作者发布带有人工智能语音的角色体验，在发布之前，它已经创建了 36 个具有“一致的声音和角色”的角色，创作者可以将其用作 NPC。这些角色包括 Fortnite 的主要角色，如特工 Jonesy、Peely（香蕉）、Fishstick（一条会走路的鱼）和 Cuddle Team Leader（戴着粉色熊吉祥物头）。 Epic 与去年的达斯·维达 NPC 一起测试了人工智能角色，该角色由詹姆斯·厄尔·琼斯的声音提供支持——这是琼斯遗产管理公司签署的一项合作协议。尽管玩家很快就让维德发誓（Epic 很快就解决了这个问题），但该公司在维德首次亮相后不久就宣布，《堡垒之夜》的创作者将能够制作自己的人工智能角色。  Epic 表示，这些新角色的声音依赖于“专门用于开发商建造的岛屿的独立专业演员的表演”。 “演员们同意将他们的表演用于开发语音模型，为这些由法学硕士支持的《堡垒之夜》角色创建语音响应。” 《堡垒之夜》内容创作者 Shiina 制作了一段包含部分声音的视频：[媒体：https://twitter.com/ShiinaBR/status/2077838679351898502] 听起来 Epic 想要制作由出现在《堡垒之夜》宇宙中的知名演员配音的角色，但必须获得正确的批准才能这样做。该公司表示：“我们的下一步是与相关公会和曾在《堡垒之夜：大逃杀》中工作过的角色配音演员合作，探索在《堡垒之夜》生态系统中提供他们原创声音的机会。” Epic 开始让创作者
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
